prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-TTX-6IN1-ALUM-JEWELRY-HAMMER Product Type: HAMMER_MALLET Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: 6 in 1 Aluminum Hammer Jewelry Making Supplies by ToolTreaux Description: Made from lightweight yet durable aluminum, this specialty hammer features a six-pronged head designed for shaping and forming; ideal for use on soft metals in jewelry making and metal arts.

The six different heads are all removable as needed, while the ergonomic handle ensures a firm, balanced grip, reducing hand fatigue during extended use. The diverse head shapes like flat surface, rounded-pointed, cone-shaped and more, cater to a broad spectrum of crafting needs.

Whether you're a seasoned metal smith or a beginner, this hammer brings both functionality and finesse to your workbench or studio.

Weight: 0.24lbs

Length: 9.0 inches

Materials: Aluminum, Wood Search Terms: jewelry making supplies; art supplies; craft supplies; jewelry hammer; multi head hammer; multi prong hammer; multitool; jewelry making tools; hammer; metal working tools fabrication; hand tools; metal smithing supplies; metal smithing hammer Features: - SPECIALTY JEWELRY HAMMER: Features a six pronged head designed for shaping and forming; ideal for use on soft metals in jewelry making and metal arts - REMOVABLE HEADS: The diverse head shapes like flat surface, rounded-pointed, cone-shaped and more, cater to a broad spectrum of crafting needs and are all removable - ALUMINUM HAMMER HEAD: Ideal for jewelry hammers due to the materials lightweight, non sparking and non corrosive properties; suitable for striking metal pieces without the risk of damaging the metal being worked on - WOOD HANDLE: Ergonomic wood handle ensures a firm, balanced grip, reducing hand fatigue during extended use - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 9 x 2 x 2 inches; Weight: 0.24lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: Removable Heads, Ergonomic Wood Handle, Lightweight Aluminum, Ideal For Metal Smithing And Jewelry Making

openai.title_differentiation: Six Pronged Multi Head Design, Removable Heads, Lightweight Aluminum, Ergonomic Wood Handle, For Soft Metals
